scripts.build:all: pnpm --filter rem-agent-core build && pnpm --filter rem-agent-bridge build && pnpm --filter rem-agent-tui build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter rem-agent-core build && pnpm --filter rem-agent-core typecheck && pnpm --filter rem-agent-bridge build && pnpm --filter rem-agent-bridge typecheck && pnpm --filter rem-agent-tui build && pnpm --filter rem-agent-tui typecheck
